description: Session continuity test: user disconnects and reconnects with same MCP key. System should restore active project, pending gates, draft campaigns.

steps.description: User reconnects. get_context should return full state with auto-set project.
User asks about pipeline — system should use active project without re-selecting.
steps.user_prompt: How many companies did we find?

steps.description: If pending approval gates exist, system surfaces them as action_required.

db_checks: User.active_project_id is set correctly after get_context
get_context returns action_required if pending gates exist
get_context returns action_required_campaigns if drafts exist
